pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.3.4.RELEASE to 3.2.3 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target version is not updated to match the runtime JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the generic Flapdoodle MongoDB embed dependency with the Spring Boot 3.x specific variant.
pom.xml.why_exists: The generic artifact is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x auto-configuration; the spring30x variant is required for integration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the JUnit Vintage engine exclusion from spring-boot-starter-test.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x no longer includes JUnit Vintage by default, so the exclusion is obsolete and potentially confusing, though not strictly a compile error.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/MyProject.general_idea: Changed the projection name from 'My' to 'my' to follow naming conventions.
